library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 1. Isolate the true calculated PIG mean (emmean) and standard error (SE) from your primary emmeans object
# This ensures we fetch the raw average PIG, not the comparison difference.
replicate_means <- em_df %>%
  filter(!global_treatment %in% c("Dodine Baseline (do)", "Negative Control (C-)")) %>%
  select(global_treatment, SE, emmean)
